get.summary: returns a list of agreements

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Which page of agreements to get.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: How many agreements should be returned per page.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description:
Filter agreements by a specific attribute. Options are:</br>
                    ```filter[name]``` - Returns only agreements with the specified name attribute. This can query name with partial match.</br>
                    ```filter[created_at][before]``` - Returns only agreements created before this date. Must be in ISO8601 format.</br>
                    ```filter[created_at][after]``` - Returns only agreements created after this date. Must be in ISO8601 format.</br>
                    ```filter[status_updated_at][before]``` - Returns only agreements with status updated before this date. Must be in ISO8601 format.</br>
                    ```filter[status_updated_at][after]``` - Returns only agreements with status updated after this date. Must be in ISO8601 format.</br>
                    ```filter[status_id][]``` - Filter to agreements with a ```status_id``` that contains the specified value.</br>
                    ```filter[template_id][]``` - Filter to agreements with a ```template_id``` that contains the specified value.</br>
                    ```filter[analyze_agreement_id][]``` - Filter to agreements with an ```analyze_agreement_id``` that contains the specified value.</br></br>
                    NOTE: Query multiple ```status_id``` or ```template_id``` using syntax: ```?filter[template_id][]=4076215b-2476-467b-893d-1fe9fd9199d9&filter[template_id][]=93978d89-38a9-4d5f-b531-9468ff1ba9af```</br>

get.summary: returns information about the current user and a health check status
returns a list of tasks

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Which page of tasks to get.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: How many tasks should be returned per page.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description:
Filter tasks by a specific attribute. Options are:</br>
                    ```filter[name]``` - Returns only tasks with the specified name attribute. This can query name with partial match.</br>
                    ```filter[active]``` - Returns either active or inactive tasks. Options are: `true` or `false`.</br>
                    ```filter[status][]``` - Returns only tasks with the specified statuses. Options are: ```unreviewed```, ```approved```, ```rejected```</br>
                    ```filter[agreement_id][]``` - Returns only tasks that belong to an agreement with the specified agreement UUIDs.</br>
                    ```filter[author_id][]``` - Returns only tasks that have an author with the specified user UUIDs.</br>
                    ```filter[assignee_ids][]``` - Returns only tasks assigned to the specified user UUIDs. Includes tasks with additional assignee UUIDs besides those specified.</br>
                    NOTE: Query multiple ```agreement_id``` or ```author_id``` using syntax: ```?filter[agreement_id][]=4076215b-2476-467b-893d-1fe9fd9199d9&filter[agreement_id][]=93978d89-38a9-4d5f-b531-9468ff1ba9af```</br>

id.description: The UUID of the task record.

active.description: Denotes if the task is active or not.

agreement_id.description: The UUID of the parent agreement. Will be null for stand-alone tasks.

approval_type.description: The requirements of approval. Will be null for tasks of type GenericTask.

assignee_ids.description: Array of the assignee User UUIDs.

author_id.description: The UUID of the task author.

created_at.description: The ISO 8601 datetime of when the task was created.

due_date.description: The ISO 8601 datetime of the task due date.

position.description: Denotes the order for "ordered" tasks in which tasks should be completed. Tasks of type StandaloneTask and GenericTask can have a null position.

resolver_id.description: The UUID of the User that completed the task.

status.description: Indicates the current status of a task.

text.example: Please review the latest version and approve the agreement to complete this task

type.description: Indicates the type of a task.

last_name.description: The last name of the user.

get.summary: returns a list of templates

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Which page of templates to get.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: How many templates should be returned per page.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description:
Filter templates by a specific attribute. Options are:</br>
                    ```filter[created_at][before]``` - Returns only templates created before this date. Must be in ISO8601 format.</br>
                    ```filter[created_at][after]``` - Returns only templates created after this date. Must be in ISO8601 format.</br>
                    ```filter[name]``` - Returns only templates with the specified name attribute. This can query name with partial match.</br>
                    ```filter[kind]``` - Returns only templates with the specified kind attribute. __Must be draft, intake or request_form__.</br></br>
                    NOTE: Query multiple ```kind``` using syntax: ```?filter[kind][]=intake&filter[kind][]=draft```</br>
